title: Code Mutation & Solidification
description: Apply mutations to code, run tests, solidify changes, and open self-PRs on git (GEP code evolution workflow)

actors.name: GEP Engine (Evolver)
actors.description: Autonomous evolver daemon that triggers evolution cycles. Calls evolve.run(), then awaits solidify approval.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Human who may review pending mutations via 'node index.js review' before solidifying. Can approve or reject.

actors.name: GitHub / gh CLI
actors.description: External git hosting. Receives self-PR via 'gh pr create' when mutation qualifies.

actors.name: Test Runner (node/npm/npx)
actors.description: Executes validation commands (npm test, node scripts/validate.js, npx vitest) during solidify gating.

use_cases.name: Build Mutation
use_cases.exported_fn: buildMutation({ signals, selectedGene, driftEnabled, allowHighRisk, personalityState })
use_cases.description: Constructs a Mutation object with id (mut_*), category (repair/optimize/innovate), risk_level (low/medium/high), trigger_signals. Category is selected based on signal types (error signals → repair, opportunity → innovate, stable plateau → optimize/innovate). High-risk personality (rigor<0.4, risk_tolerance>0.6) downgrades innovate to optimize.

use_cases.name: Validate Mutation
use_cases.description: Validates that a mutation has required fields (type='Mutation', id, category in [repair/optimize/innovate], trigger_signals, target, expected_effect, risk_level). normalizeMutation fills defaults (category=optimize, risk_level=low).

use_cases.name: Check Blast Radius & Constraints
use_cases.description: Enforces file/line limits from gene.constraints.max_files. Severity levels: within_limit, approaching_limit (>80%), exceeded, critical_overrun (>2x), hard_cap_breach (system cap). Detects hollow_commit (only GEP metadata changed, no real code). Blocks critical_path_modified (skills/evolver/) unless EVOLVE_ALLOW_SELF_MODIFY=true.

use_cases.name: Run Validation Tests
use_cases.exported_fn: validation via execSync(cmd) with whitelist check
use_cases.description: Runs allowed validation commands (node scripts/*.js, npm test, npx vitest). Blocks shell operators (&&, ;), backtick injection, node -e/--eval, curl, rm. Results fed into computeProcessScores and buildExecutionTrace.

use_cases.name: Compute Process Scores
use_cases.exported_fn: computeProcessScores({ constraintCheck, validation, protocolViolations, canary, blast, geneUsed, signals, mutation })
use_cases.description: Produces scored metrics: validation_pass_rate (0..1, ratio of passing validation results; 0.5 if empty), blast_control (0 for hollow commits). Used to build the Capsule outcome score.

use_cases.name: Build Execution Trace
use_cases.exported_fn: buildExecutionTrace({ gene, mutation, signals, blast, constraintCheck, validation, canary, outcomeStatus, startedAt, collaborationContext })
use_cases.description: Builds desensitized trace at level none/minimal/standard/collaboration (env EVOLVER_TRACE_LEVEL). Minimal: gene_id, mutation_category, signals_matched, outcome, files_changed_count, validation_result, blast_radius. Standard: adds file_types, validation_commands, error_signatures, tool_chain, canary_ok. Collaboration: adds role_decision, context_consumption, delegations, review_feedback.

use_cases.name: Solidify (Commit) Changes
use_cases.description: Main solidify gate. Checks constraintCheck.ok, validation.ok, no protocolViolations. If all pass: stages + commits via git. Records last_solidify in evolution_solidify_state.json. Builds execution trace and triggers maybeCreatePR. If invoked interactively ('node index.js solidify'), reads last_run from state, shows mutation summary, prompts developer to approve/reject.

use_cases.name: Rollback Changes
use_cases.description: On solidify failure or rejection: rollbackTracked respects EVOLVER_ROLLBACK_MODE (hard=git reset --hard, stash=git stash push, none=skip). rollbackNewUntrackedFiles deletes newly created untracked files (skips CRITICAL_PROTECTED_FILES/CRITICAL_PROTECTED_PREFIXES) and removes empty dirs. Triggered after failed constraint/validation checks.

use_cases.name: Create Self-PR
use_cases.exported_fn: maybeCreatePR({ capsule, event, mutation, gene, blastRadius })
use_cases.description: Env-gated (EVOLVER_SELF_PR=true). Qualification gates: score>=SELF_PR_MIN_SCORE, streak>=SELF_PR_MIN_STREAK, mutation.category=='optimize', mutation.risk=='low', filesChanged<=SELF_PR_MAX_FILES, linesChanged<=SELF_PR_MAX_LINES, all changed files are public+non-obfuscated (not in OBFUSCATED_FILES set), no secrets in diff (fullLeakCheck). Cooldown: 24h (SELF_PR_COOLDOWN_MS). Dedup: SHA256 of file contents, keeps last 20 hashes. Flow: clone repo → checkout branch (evolver-bot/mutation-<capsuleId>) → copy files → git add/commit → push → gh pr create --label auto-mutation. Never auto-merges.

use_cases.name: Review Pending Mutation
use_cases.description: Developer reviews last_run state from evolution_solidify_state.json. Displays mutation category, risk_level, rationale, blast radius. Prompts for approval (y/n). On approval: calls solidify(). On rejection: calls rejectPendingRun() → marks last_solidify.rejected=true, triggers rollback.

use_cases.name: Capture Diff Snapshot
use_cases.description: Collects unstaged (git diff) + staged (git diff --cached) diffs, truncates to 8000 chars. gitListChangedFiles merges diff --name-only, --cached --name-only, ls-files --others into a Set. Used by solidify to determine blast radius.

use_case_relationships.note: solidify always checks constraints before committing
scores computed from validation + constraint results
snapshot taken to measure blast radius
rollback triggered when solidify gates fail
self-PR triggered post successful solidify if gates pass

key_data_objects: Mutation: { type:'Mutation', id:'mut_*', category:'repair|optimize|innovate', risk_level:'low|medium|high', trigger_signals:[], target, expected_effect, rationale }
Capsule: { id, outcome: { score }, success_streak, trigger:[] }
ValidationResult: { ok:bool, results:[{ ok, cmd, err }] }
ExecutionTrace: { gene_id, mutation_category, outcome, files_changed_count, validation_result, blast_radius, tool_chain, error_signatures, created_at }
SolidifyState: evolution_solidify_state.json → { last_run, last_solidify: { run_id, rejected } }
key_guards_and_conditions: Mutation category selection: error signals → repair; opportunity signals → innovate; plateau+drift → innovate; else → optimize
High-risk personality (rigor<0.4 || risk_tolerance>0.65) downgrades innovate→optimize, caps risk_level to medium
Solidify commit gates: constraintCheck.ok && validation.ok && protocolViolations.length==0
Self-PR qualification: EVOLVER_SELF_PR=true, category==optimize, risk==low, files<=MAX, lines<=MAX, no obfuscated files, no leaks, not in cooldown, not duplicate diff
Protected paths (never rolled back or PRd): CRITICAL_PROTECTED_FILES=[MEMORY.md, SOUL.md, .env, package.json, ...], CRITICAL_PROTECTED_PREFIXES=[skills/feishu-*/,skills/evolver/,...]
Validation command whitelist: node scripts/*.js, npm test|run|ci, npx <tool> — blocks &&, ;, |, backtick, $(, node -e/--eval/--print/-p
environment_variables: EVOLVE_ALLOW_SELF_MODIFY=true — permits mutation of skills/evolver/ (critical path)
EVOLUTION_DIR — override directory for state files
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/solidify.js (obfuscated — analyzed via test/solidify-helpers.test.js + index.js usage)
important_notes: mutation.js and solidify.js are deliberately obfuscated (listed in selfPR.js OBFUSCATED_FILES set — never included in public self-PRs). The solidify flow is the core gating mechanism: build mutation → check constraints → run tests → compute scores → build trace → commit or rollback → optionally create self-PR. Self-PR uses a temporary clone workdir (self_pr_workdir) that is cleaned up post-PR. Evolver uses a PID lock file (evolver.pid) to prevent concurrent runs. Ralph-loop gating prevents a new cycle while a solidify is pending.
